title: urophyllum memecyloides
intro: Urophyllum memecyloides, a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, is also known as the 'Philippine Urophyllum' and is native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. Urophyllum memecyloides has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections, due to its health benefits, such as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which is consumed orally, or made into a topical ointment or cream to treat skin conditions.
